settings.name: Balakrishna Goud Malela
settings.title: Looking for Software Engineer roles
settings.summary: 3+ YOE | Java · Spring Boot · Python · FastAPI | MS CS @ Texas Tech University (3.5 GPA) | Built zezzly

about.title: About Me
about.content: Software Engineer with 3+ years of experience building production-grade systems. At Newgen Software, optimized document processing by 40% for the State Bank of India. Currently pursuing my Master's in CS at Texas Tech University (3.5 GPA). Built zezzly, a real-time job discovery platform pulling live listings from ATS providers like Greenhouse and Lever, and AccessAI, an AI-powered access governance system using LLaMA 3.3 70B. Skilled in Java, Spring Boot, Python, FastAPI, and React. Open to Software Engineer / Backend Engineer roles across the US.

items.description: Designed and developed a scalable event-driven backend using FastAPI and Python asyncio to automate IT Help Center workflows, reducing manual overhead for a campus of 40,000+ users. Built and deployed RESTful APIs with CI/CD pipelines via GitHub Actions, improving system reliability and uptime. Collaborated with IT stakeholders to deliver production-ready software solutions aligned with institutional requirements.

Developed and optimized the Document Generation feature for the Agricultural Loan Origination System (ALOS) using robust software development practices, improving document processing speed for the State Bank of India. Collaborated with a cross-functional team of 10+ engineers using Agile methodologies, ensuring seamless integration of document workflows into the banking system. Implemented efficient Oracle database queries, leveraging SQL expertise to reduce response time.

Gained hands-on experience with iBPS (Intelligent Business Process Suite) while designing, coding, and testing workflow automation solutions, thereby improving business process efficiency. Assisted in debugging and optimizing enterprise-level applications, ensuring a 99.9% uptime for critical banking services and demonstrating strong problem-solving skills in software development.

items.title: zezzly - Jobs posted in the last 24 hours. Nothing older.
items.description: Full-stack job aggregation platform that pulls listings directly from ATS providers like Greenhouse, Lever, and Ashby, refreshing every 30 minutes and surfacing only jobs posted within the last 24 hours.

items.title: AccessAI - AI-Powered Access Management System
items.description: Full-stack RBAC platform with 3 role-based portals, integrating Groq LLaMA via Spring AI to classify access requests by risk, escalate high-risk cases, and enforce audit logs.

items.title: QuizBot - AI-Powered Network Security Learning Tool
items.description: Developed QuizBot using Streamlit and local LLMs (Ollama) to create interactive quizzes and free-form Q&A with PDF context. Features include automatic evaluation, color-coded feedback, and a sleek Streamlit UI with CLI support.

items.title: A Textbook Remedy for Domain Shifts - Medical Image Analysis
items.description: Implemented a knowledge-enhanced bottleneck model (KnoBo) to improve robustness of medical image analysis against domain shifts. Evaluated across multiple datasets, achieving significant improvements in out-of-domain performance.

items.title: RentalsBook - Car Rental Management System
items.description: Designed and developed a scalable web application for car rental bookings using PHP, MySQL, JavaScript, HTML, and CSS. Integrated secure authentication and an admin dashboard, improving booking efficiency.

items.title: Automation Testing Utility for Dynamic GUI Interfaces
items.description: Developed a modular automation testing tool using Playwright and Python to validate dynamic UI workflows including authentication, navigation, and form inputs. Integrated reporting and structured test execution to improve regression testing efficiency and reduce manual QA efforts.

items.title: SBI Agricultural Loan Origination System (ALOS)
items.description: Led the Document Generation feature development, utilizing HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Oracle. Optimized document handling workflows, enhancing operational efficiency.

items.degree: Bachelor of Technology, Electronics and Communication Engineering
